sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 14.28 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.14)

statement.latex: Let${ F}$be a soluble Fitting formation of finite groups with Kegel's property, that is,${ F}$contains every finite group of the form$G=AB=BC=CA$if$A,B,C$are in~${ F}$. Is${ F}$a saturated formation? Comment of 2013: Some progress was made in (A.\,Ballester-Bolinches, L.\,M.\,Ez\-querro, J.~Group Theory, { 8}, no.\,5 (2005), 605--611).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
